sung-jin-woo.name: SUNG JIN WOO
sung-jin-woo.title: Shadow Monarch A.K.A
sung-jin-woo.description: Sung Jin-Woo is the main character of Solo Leveling. He starts as the weakest hunter but gains a unique ability to level up after surviving a deadly dungeon. With his new powers, he becomes the Shadow Monarch, commanding an army of shadows.

cha-hae-in.name: CHA HAE-IN
cha-hae-in.title: Vice-Guild Master of Hunters
cha-hae-in.description: Cha Hae In is the Vice-Guild Master of the Hunters Guild. Known for her swordsmanship and strong sense of justice. Her sense of smell makes her wary of most people—except for Jin-Woo.

baek-yoon-ho.name: BAEK YOON-HO
baek-yoon-ho.title: S-Rank Hunter, White Tiger Guild Master
baek-yoon-ho.description: Baek Yoon-Ho is an S-Rank Hunter and leader of the White Tiger Guild. He has a beast transformation ability and keeps a respectful watch on Jin-Woo’s rising powers.

go-gun-hee.name: GO GUN-HEE
go-gun-hee.title: Chairman of the Korean Hunters Association
go-gun-hee.description: Go Gun-Hee is a wise and powerful leader who tries to guide Jin-Woo and the other hunters through the chaos of rising gate threats.

yoo-jinho.name: YOO JIN-HO
yoo-jinho.title: C-Rank Hunter, Jin-Woo's Loyal Friend
yoo-jinho.description: Jin-Ho is the son of a powerful businessman and Jin-Woo’s closest friend. Though not strong, he shows unwavering loyalty and courage.

sung-il-hwan.name: SUNG IL HWAN
sung-il-hwan.title: Jin-Woo’s Father, Lost-Returned Hunter
sung-il-hwan.description: Il-Hwan disappeared years ago in a dungeon but returned with powerful abilities. He plays a crucial role in the fight against the Monarchs.

thomas-andre.name: THOMAS ANDRE
thomas-andre.title: National-Level Hunter, Scavenger Guild
thomas-andre.description: Thomas Andre is a National-Level Hunter from America. Despite his arrogance, he eventually respects Jin-Woo's strength after their clash.

liu-zhigang.name: LIU ZHIGANG
liu-zhigang.title: National-Level Hunter from China
liu-zhigang.description: Liu Zhigang is one of the strongest hunters in the world and represents China’s power. He shows great interest in Jin-Woo’s potential.

ashborn.name: ASHBORN
ashborn.title: The Original Shadow Monarch
ashborn.description: Ashborn is the true Shadow Monarch whose powers Jin-Woo inherits. He guides and watches over Jin-Woo, shaping his destiny.

igoris.name: IGORIS
igoris.title: Monarch of the Frost
igoris.description: Igoris is the Monarch of Frost and one of Jin-Woo’s main enemies during the Monarch War. He’s ruthless and cunning.
